case_title: DIANA SLAMPYAK VS. DIRECT TO HOME APPLIACES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLAMPYAK, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIACES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
